prompt: Create a meme by combining the face expression from image 1 with the setting from image 2. Replace the sleeping student’s face in the image 2 with the Shrek-style smirk in the image 1. Add the caption: 'When I tell my group <I will do it later> knowing full well I won’t'.
prompt_refined: Generate a meme image. Utilize the setting and the body of the sleeping student from image 2. Replace the sleeping student's face with the Shrek-style smirk expression from image 1, ensuring the new face is seamlessly integrated and matches the pose and lighting of the scene. Overlay the text caption 'When I tell my group <I will do it later> knowing full well I won’t' at the bottom center of the image.
objects: Text caption: 'When I tell my group <I will do it later> knowing full well I won’t' at the bottom center
